ast.name: title
ast.source: Drag to move. Ctrl/Cmd + click to delete.
ast.target: 拖动以移动。Ctrl/Cmd + 单击以删除。

ast.name: title
ast.source: Drag to insert a new point.

ast.name: addOption
ast.source: Backlinks (notes linking to the in-range note)
ast.target: 反向链接（链接到范围内笔记的笔记）

ast.name: addOption
ast.target: 标签（具有匹配标签的笔记）

ast.name: error
ast.source: Zoom Map: failed to dispose base bitmap
ast.target: 缩放地图：释放基础位图失败

ast.name: error
ast.source: Zoom Map: failed to dispose overlay bitmap
ast.target: 缩放地图：释放叠加位图失败

ast.name: error
ast.source: Zoom Map: failed to dispose canvas source
ast.target: 缩放地图：释放画布源失败

ast.name: error
ast.source: Zoom Map: failed to delete baked SVG
ast.target: 缩放地图：删除烘焙SVG失败

ast.name: error
ast.source: Zoom Map: failed to update YAML

ast.name: error
ast.source: Zoom Map: failed to parse zoommap block
ast.target: 缩放地图：解析缩放地图块失败

ast.name: error
ast.source: Zoom Map: failed to add Font Awesome icon
ast.target: 缩放地图：添加Font Awesome图标失败

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Removes per-frame overrides from this marker (falls back to preset/icon defaults).
ast.target: 移除此标记的每帧覆盖（回退到预设/图标默认值）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Wiki link (without [[ ]]). Supports note and note#heading.
ast.target: Wiki链接（不带[[ ]]）。支持笔记和笔记#标题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show the tooltip even if this marker has a link.
ast.target: 即使此标记有链接，也显示工具提示。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Renders the tooltip text as a label on the map (useful for village names).
ast.target: 将工具提示文本渲染为地图上的标签（适用于村庄名称）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Where to place the always-visible label relative to the pin anchor.
ast.target: 相对于图钉锚点放置始终可见标签的位置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Positive moves the label down, negative moves it up.
ast.target: 正值将标签下移，负值将其上移。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Pin scales with the map (no inverse wrapper).
ast.target: 图钉随地图缩放（无反向包装器）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: To set up new icons go to settings.
ast.target: 要设置新图标，请转到设置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Overrides the icon color for this marker (SVG icons only).
ast.target: 覆盖此标记的图标颜色（仅限SVG图标）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose an existing layer or type a new name.
ast.target: 选择现有图层或输入新名称。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Uses the current map scale + unit settings.
ast.target: 使用当前地图比例+单位设置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose the draw layer for this drawing.
ast.target: 选择此绘图的绘制图层。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: No other layer available to move markers.
ast.target: 没有其他可用图层来移动标记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Prefer canvas for larger SVG maps.
ast.target: 对于较大的SVG地图，推荐使用画布。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Stable identifier if you store markers inline in the note.
ast.target: 如果您在笔记中内联存储标记，则为稳定标识符。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Drawn above the map. Supports overhang.
ast.target: 绘制在地图上方。支持悬垂。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Framepx = values in the frame image pixel space. Percent = 0..100 of the outer box.
ast.target: Framepx = 帧图像像素空间中的值。Percent = 外框的0..100。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If set: newly placed swap pins will be created in this marker layer (created if missing).
ast.target: 如果设置：新放置的交换图钉将创建在此标记图层中（如果缺失则创建）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, hovering this swap pin shows a preview without ctrl/cmd.
ast.target: 如果启用，悬停此交换图钉会显示预览，无需按住ctrl/cmd。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Experimental. Re-renders the note that contains the map/dashboard after this party pin updates.
ast.target: 实验性。在此派对图钉更新后，重新渲染包含地图/仪表板的笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Expands the search starting from the in-range linked notes.
ast.target: 从范围内链接的笔记开始扩展搜索。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Limits which marker layers are considered when scanning for in-range markers. Custom uses layer *names* (comma separated).
ast.target: 限制扫描范围内标记时考虑的标记图层。自定义使用图层*名称*（逗号分隔）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Example: "npc, shops, quests". If empty, all layers are searched.
ast.target: 示例：\"npc, shops, quests\"。如果为空，则搜索所有图层。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, newly created party pins will scale with the map (no inverse wrapper).
ast.target: 如果启用，新创建的派对图钉将随地图缩放（无反向包装器）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Used to select custom units for party radius.
ast.target: 用于为派对半径选择自定义单位。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Vault folder where party pin notes are created.
ast.target: 创建派对图钉笔记的保险库文件夹。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: These tags are applied as or filter in the embedded bases view.
ast.target: 这些标签在嵌入式基础视图中作为或过滤器应用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: One line per key=value, multiple values with | or ,
ast.target: 每行一个key=value，多个值用|或,分隔。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Target size for the longer side of the image.
ast.target: 图像较长边的目标尺寸。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Will be created in the vault (webp). If it exists, a suffix will be added.
ast.target: 将在保险库中创建（webp）。如果存在，将添加后缀。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Renames the current markers.json to <exported>.markers.json. WARNING: other maps using the same markers file must be updated manually.
ast.target: 将当前markers.json重命名为<exported>.markers.json。警告：使用相同标记文件的其他地图必须手动更新。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Removes per-frame overrides from this pin.
ast.target: 移除此图钉的每帧覆盖。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Controls whether the grid is visible for gm, player screen, or both.
ast.target: 控制网格对GM、玩家屏幕或两者是否可见。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Square: cell size. Hex: hex width.
ast.target: 正方形：单元格大小。六边形：六边形宽度。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Absolute anchor in image pixels. For precise alignment use the live alignment command in the map menu.
ast.target: 图像像素中的绝对锚点。要精确对齐，请使用地图菜单中的实时对齐命令。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, right click cycles through all base images.
ast.target: 如果启用，右键单击将循环浏览所有基础图像。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If rotate is disabled, right click switches to this base.
ast.target: 如果禁用旋转，右键单击将切换到此基础。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Places the pin in viewport space (stays fixed in the window).
ast.target: 将图钉放置在视口空间中（在窗口中保持固定）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Prevents editing and moving this box.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If disabled: each baseline keeps its own text.
ast.target: 如果禁用：每个基线保留自己的文本。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled: baselines snap horizontal by default, hold ctrl for free angle.
ast.target: 如果启用：基线默认水平对齐，按住ctrl键可自由调整角度。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: CSS font-family value, e.g. Caveat, var(--font-text).

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Height of each input line box. Leave empty to auto-calc from font size.
ast.target: 每个输入行框的高度。留空以根据字体大小自动计算。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Shrinks the usable auto-baseline width inside the text box.
ast.target: 缩小文本框内可用的自动基线宽度。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Shrinks the usable auto-baseline height inside the text box.
ast.target: 缩小文本框内可用的自动基线高度。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Includes grid overlays in the player screen note.
ast.target: 在玩家屏幕笔记中包含网格叠加层。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Uses dice roller’s dice view (if installed).
ast.target: 使用骰子滚动器的骰子视图（如果已安装）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Caches decoded images across the entire Obsidian session (ref-counted, evicts only when near limit).
ast.target: 在整个Obsidian会话中缓存解码后的图像（引用计数，仅在接近限制时才清除）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Maximum memory used for cached decoded images. Default: 512 megabyte.
ast.target: 缓存解码图像使用的最大内存。默认：512兆字节。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, all overlays of an open map are kept in the session cache (even if hidden).
ast.target: 启用后，打开的地图的所有叠加层都将保留在会话缓存中（即使隐藏）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled (and cache is enabled), maps will use canvas rendering for base/overlay images while markers stay DOM. Useful for fast image redraw on weaker devices.
ast.target: 启用后（且缓存已启用），地图将使用画布渲染基础/叠加图像，而标记保持DOM。适用于在较弱设备上快速重绘图像。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Shows the linked note’s filename inside the map tooltip. Useful when linked notes are still empty.
ast.target: 在地图工具提示中显示链接笔记的文件名。当链接笔记仍为空时很有用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Displays small hud buttons for zooming in and out.
ast.target: 显示用于放大和缩小的小型HUD按钮。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled: middle click on a pin opens its linked note in a new tab.
ast.target: 启用后：在图钉上单击中键将在新标签页中打开其链接的笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Controls the maximum raster lod for SVG base images. Higher = sharper at high zoom, but more RAM and slower upgrades.
ast.target: 控制SVG基础图像的最大光栅LOD。越高=在高缩放时越清晰，但需要更多RAM且升级更慢。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Shows a small preview thumbnail for non-SVG image icons in the icon library list.
ast.target: 在图标库列表中为非SVG图像图标显示小型预览缩略图。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enables text boxes with baselines and inline typing on maps.
ast.target: 在地图上启用带有基线和内联键入的文本框。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enables SVG grid overlays, grid editing and grid menu entries on maps.
ast.target: 在地图上启用SVG网格叠加层、网格编辑和网格菜单项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Allows assigning terrain factors per measurement segment for travel time.
ast.target: 允许为每个测量段分配地形因子以计算旅行时间。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, new pins will have "scale like sticker" enabled in the marker editor.
ast.target: 启用后，新图钉将在标记编辑器中默认启用\"像贴纸一样缩放\"。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, markers default to the first visible unlocked layer, whether created or placed.
ast.target: 启用后，标记默认为第一个可见的未锁定图层，无论是创建还是放置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, the draw menu and draw layers become available on maps.
ast.target: 启用后，绘制菜单和绘制图层将在地图上可用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enables "send to screen" integration with the plugin "ttrpg tools: screen display".
ast.target: 启用与插件\"ttrpg tools: screen display\"的\"发送到屏幕\"集成。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Folder where temporary map notes and marker snapshots for the second screen are written.
ast.target: 用于写入第二屏幕的临时地图笔记和标记快照的文件夹。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Adds a background shape under the icon (separate color, optional outline).
ast.target: 在图标下方添加背景形状（单独的颜色，可选的轮廓）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use existing SVG icon as the base.
ast.target: 使用现有SVG图标作为基础。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Moves the actual icon relative to the base. Negative = left, positive = right.
ast.target: 将实际图标相对于基础移动。负值=左，正值=右。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Moves the actual icon relative to the base. Negative = up, positive = down.
ast.target: 相对于基底移动实际图标。负值=向上，正值=向下。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Store marker data in JSON beside image, or inline in the note.
ast.target: 将标记数据以JSON格式存储在图像旁边，或内联在笔记中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Initial width if wrap: true and no width is set in the code block.
ast.target: 如果启用了自动换行且代码块中未设置宽度时的初始宽度。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 每步的乘数。1.1 = 每刻度增加10%。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Which mouse button pans the map?
ast.target: 哪个鼠标按钮用于平移地图？

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Max width and height in pixels.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Opens preview popovers on simple hover.
ast.target: 简单悬停时打开预览弹出窗口。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, placing a pin from the pins menu opens the marker editor.
ast.target: 启用后，从图钉菜单放置图钉会打开标记编辑器。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Global defaults for marker creation and behavior.
ast.target: 标记创建和行为的全局默认值。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Custom units + distance→time presets are managed in packs (import/export supported).
ast.target: 自定义单位 + 距离→时间预设在包中管理（支持导入/导出）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Save/load your icons and collections to/from a JSON file.
ast.target: 将您的图标和集合保存到JSON文件/从JSON文件加载。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Download common SVG packs into the configured folder.
ast.target: 将常用SVG包下载到配置的文件夹中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Create a pin icon from an SVG file in the configured folder, or sort the SVG icon list alphabetically.
ast.target: 从配置文件夹中的SVG文件创建图钉图标，或按字母顺序排列SVG图标列表。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Create a new image-based icon entry, or sort the image icon list alphabetically.
ast.target: 创建新的基于图像的图标条目，或按字母顺序排列图像图标列表。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 工具提示标签始终可见

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Place as hud pin by default

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 悬停自动打开弹出窗口

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 相关笔记部分（标签/反向链接）

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 筛选标签（可选，逗号分隔）

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 在第二屏幕上显示网格

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Hybrid render: canvas images + DOM markers
ast.target: 混合渲染：画布图像 + DOM 标记

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Show linked file name on hover
ast.target: 悬停时显示链接文件名

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 在地图上显示缩放 +/- 按钮

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Middle click pins opens linked note in new tab
ast.target: 中键点击固定在新标签页中打开链接笔记

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 最大 SVG 栅格化比例

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Settings UI: show preview for image icons
ast.target: 设置界面：显示图像图标预览

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 启用专业测量（地形线段）

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 图钉：默认“像贴纸一样缩放”

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Prefer first active layer for new markers
ast.target: 新标记优先使用第一个活动图层

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Open editor when placing pin from menu
ast.target: 从菜单放置图钉时打开编辑器

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 保险库中的 SVG 图标文件夹

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Add SVG icon or sort the list
ast.target: 添加 SVG 图标或排序列表

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Add new icon or sort the list
ast.target: 添加新图标或排序列表

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.target: 文件夹/笔记 或 笔记#标题

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Zoom Map: duplicate zoommap id detected in note.
ast.target: Zoom Map：笔记中检测到重复的 zoommap id。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Failed to apply markerLayers to marker store
ast.target: 将 markerLayers 应用到标记存储失败

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Zoom Map: failed to refresh markdown view
ast.target: Zoom Map：刷新 markdown 视图失败

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Zoom Map: related section build failed
ast.target: Zoom Map：相关部分构建失败

ast.name: warn
ast.source: ZoomMap: baked SVG file not found
ast.target: ZoomMap：未找到烘焙的 SVG 文件

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Zoom Map: failed to close cached image
ast.target: 缩放地图：关闭缓存图像失败

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 没有可用的活动地图预览。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please select at least one base image.
ast.target: 请至少选择一张基础图像。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Cannot store default view (image not ready).
ast.target: 无法存储默认视图（图像未就绪）。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 无法定位缩放地图块（嵌入/标注？）。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Default view unchanged (already up to date).
ast.target: 默认视图未更改（已是最新）。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 默认视图已存储在 YAML 中。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No default view found in YAML.
ast.target: 在 YAML 中未找到默认视图。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 默认视图已从 YAML 中移除。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 播放器屏幕图层设置已保存。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Player screen integration is disabled in preferences.
ast.target: 播放器屏幕集成在首选项中已禁用。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Player screen plugin not found or not enabled.
ast.target: 未找到或未启用播放器屏幕插件。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Drawing tools are disabled in the plugin preferences.
ast.target: 绘图工具在插件首选项中已禁用。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No draw layers exist yet. Create one under image layers → draw layers → add draw layer…
ast.target: 尚无绘图图层。请在图像图层 → 绘图图层 → 添加绘图图层…下创建一个。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No draw layer is active. Enable a draw layer under image layers → draw layers.
ast.target: 没有活动的绘图图层。请在图像图层 → 绘图图层下启用一个绘图图层。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Draw rectangle: click start point, move the mouse, click end point. Press esc to cancel.
ast.target: 绘制矩形：点击起点，移动鼠标，点击终点。按 Esc 取消。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Draw circle: click center, move the mouse, click radius point. Press esc to cancel.
ast.target: 绘制圆形：点击圆心，移动鼠标，点击半径点。按 Esc 取消。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Draw polyline: click to add points, move the mouse for preview, double-click or right-click to finish. Press esc to cancel.
ast.target: 绘制折线：点击添加点，移动鼠标预览，双击或右键单击完成。按 Esc 取消。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Draw polygon: click to add points, move the mouse for preview, double-click or right-click to finish. Press esc to cancel.
ast.target: 绘制多边形：点击添加点，移动鼠标预览，双击或右键单击完成。按 Esc 取消。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Grid alignment: move the mouse and click to set the anchor. Press + / - to change spacing. Press esc to cancel.
ast.target: 网格对齐：移动鼠标并点击以设置锚点。按 +/- 更改间距。按 Esc 取消。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: This drawing cannot be edited right now.

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Edit points: drag handles, drag green midpoint handles to add points, ctrl/cmd-click a point to delete it. Press esc to cancel.
ast.target: 编辑点：拖动手柄，拖动绿色中点手柄以添加点，Ctrl/Cmd+点击点以删除。按 Esc 取消。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Edit rectangle: drag corner handles. Press esc to cancel.
ast.target: 编辑矩形：拖动角手柄。按 Esc 取消。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Edit circle: drag center or radius handle. Press esc to cancel.
ast.target: 编辑圆形：拖动圆心或半径手柄。按 Esc 取消。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No baselines in this text box yet. Use 'draw lines' first.
ast.target: 此文本框中尚无基线。请先使用“绘制线条”。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No more baselines in this text box.
ast.target: 此文本框中没有更多基线。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Text layers are disabled in preferences.
ast.target: 文本图层在首选项中已禁用。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Draw baselines: click start + end. Hold ctrl for free angle (if enabled). Esc to exit.
ast.target: 绘制基线：点击起点 + 终点。按住 Ctrl 以自由角度绘制（如果已启用）。按 Esc 退出。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Measure terrains: add at least 2 points first.
ast.target: 测量地形：请先添加至少 2 个点。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No terrains configured. Add terrains in settings → travel rules.
ast.target: 未配置地形。请在设置 → 旅行规则中添加地形。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Create a visible text layer first.
ast.target: 请先创建一个可见的文本图层。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: This drawing cannot be converted to a text box.
ast.target: 此绘图无法转换为文本框。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Configure max travel time presets in settings → travel rules.

ast.name: Notice

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Move mode: drag the text box to move it. Toggle move again to stop.
ast.target: 移动模式：拖动文本框以移动。再次切换移动以停止。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Exporting SVG… (this may take a moment)
ast.target: 正在导出 SVG…（这可能需要一些时间）

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Cannot move markers.json when storage mode is 'note'.
ast.target: 当存储模式为“笔记”时，无法移动 markers.json。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Exported and moved markers.json, but YAML could not be updated.
ast.target: 已导出并移动 markers.json，但 YAML 无法更新。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Markers.json moved to the exported base. Important: other maps using the old markers.json must be updated manually.
ast.target: Markers.json 已移动到导出的基础。重要提示：使用旧 markers.json 的其他地图必须手动更新。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Party preset uses a custom unit but no customunitid is set.
ast.target: 队伍预设使用自定义单位，但未设置 customunitid。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Cannot create party pin: map scale is not calibrated for this unit.
ast.target: 无法创建队伍图钉：地图比例尺未为此单位校准。

ast.target: 无法删除最后一张基础图像。

ast.name: Notice

ast.target: 已添加，但 YAML 更新失败。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Collections bundle pins, favorites and stickers for specific base images. Create a 'global' collection without bindings for items that should be available everywhere.
ast.target: 集合将图钉、收藏和贴纸捆绑到特定的基础图像。为需要在所有地方可用的项目创建一个没有绑定的“全局”集合。
